/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=thread -g -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.15.3 -o ../../../../bin/libggml-base.0.15.3.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-base.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-alloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend-meta.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-opt.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-threading.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/gguf.cpp.o"  -lm
